inputs.label: Cup Amount
inputs.businessContext: Number of standard cups to convert to grams.

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of standard cups to convert to grams.
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Standardtassen zur Umrechnung in Gramm.

inputs.label: Cup Volume
inputs.businessContext: Volume of one cup in milliliters. Standard US cup is 236.588 mL.

businessContext_i18n.en: Volume of one cup in milliliters. Standard US cup is 236.588 mL.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Bir bardağın mililitre cinsinden hacmi. Standart ABD bardağı 236.588 mL'dir.
businessContext_i18n.de: Volumen einer Tasse in Millilitern. Standard-US-Tasse ist 236,588 ml.

inputs.label: Density
inputs.businessContext: Density of the ingredient in grams per milliliter at 20°C. Water = 1 g/mL.

businessContext_i18n.en: Density of the ingredient in grams per milliliter at 20°C. Water = 1 g/mL.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Malzemenin 20°C'de gram/mililitre cinsinden yoğunluğu. Su = 1 g/mL.
businessContext_i18n.de: Dichte der Zutat in Gramm pro Milliliter bei 20 °C. Wasser = 1 g/ml.

inputs.label: Temperature
inputs.businessContext: Temperature of the ingredient for density correction. Default is 20°C.

businessContext_i18n.en: Temperature of the ingredient for density correction. Default is 20°C.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yoğunluk düzeltmesi için malzemenin sıcaklığı. Varsayılan 20°C.
businessContext_i18n.de: Temperatur der Zutat für Dichtekorrektur. Standard ist 20 °C.

inputs.label: Temp. Correction Factor
inputs.businessContext: Linear temperature coefficient of density. Density(T) = density(20°C) × (1 + coeff × (T−20)). Usually small; set to 0 if no correction needed.

businessContext_i18n.en: Linear temperature coefficient of density. Density(T) = density(20°C) × (1 + coeff × (T−20)). Usually small; set to 0 if no correction needed.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yoğunluğun lineer sıcaklık katsayısı. Yoğunluk(T) = yoğunluk(20°C) × (1 + katsayı × (T−20)). Genellikle küçüktür; düzeltme gerekmiyorsa 0 olarak ayarlayın.
businessContext_i18n.de: Linearer Temperaturkoeffizient der Dichte. Dichte(T) = Dichte(20 °C) × (1 + Koeffizient × (T−20)). Normalerweise klein; auf 0 setzen, wenn keine Korrektur erforderlich.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
